forbidden.name: not-to-unresolvable
forbidden.comment: This module depends on a module that cannot be found. If it is an npm module, add it to package.json; otherwise fix the import path.

forbidden.name: no-non-package-json
forbidden.comment: This module depends on an npm package that is not declared in package.json.

forbidden.name: no-duplicate-dep-types
forbidden.comment: This module depends on an external package declared in more than one dependency bucket.

forbidden.name: not-to-test-from-production
forbidden.comment: Production code must not import from test files. Factor shared helpers into production or test utility modules instead.

forbidden.name: production-not-to-apps
forbidden.comment: Production packages must not import examples, proof harnesses, or app composition code.

forbidden.name: core-not-to-firegrid-packages
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/core is the shared contract. It must not import other Firegrid packages.

forbidden.name: runtime-only-to-core
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/runtime may depend on @firegrid/core, but not fluent authoring, stores, substrates, trace, or apps.

forbidden.name: clients-only-to-core
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/clients is a pure invocation-client package. It may depend on @firegrid/core, but not fluent authoring, runtime, stores, substrates, trace, or apps.

forbidden.name: log-not-to-product-packages
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/log is the raw S2 log substrate and must not import product/runtime packages.

forbidden.name: trace-not-to-product-packages
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/trace is an observability sink and must not import product/runtime packages.

forbidden.name: fluent-not-to-store-log-trace-or-apps
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/fluent is the authoring surface. Keep concrete stores, raw log substrate, trace sinks, and apps below it.

forbidden.name: store-not-to-trace-or-apps
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/store is the production S2-backed store/binding. It may use core/runtime contracts and @firegrid/log, but must not import fluent authoring, clients, trace sinks, or apps.

forbidden.name: proof-runtime-not-to-proof-registration
forbidden.comment: The proof harness runtime must not import concrete proof registrations.
